To develop a function that calculates the cumulative sum of all numerical values within a list of tuples, we must first understand the structure of the input. The list may contain nested tuples, which means we need to recursively traverse through each element. This ensures that no numeric value is overlooked, regardless of its depth within the tuple hierarchy. The function must also be able to filter out non-numeric elements such as strings or other data types.
